speaker: MATT
raw_text: Now I need you all to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: For trade, what does that mean?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You know what? I'm going to pull the battle map.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Cinnamon was his most hated spice!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I gave him a secret!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: He fucking hates cinnamon!

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! I thought I was helping.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: You were. You did great.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He's drifted up to that point there.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: He's in the teleportation circle.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Ashley, even you don't believe that.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As you guys are preparing here, the whispers begin to slowly spill out of its face, voices spreading out. I need Jester, Yasha, and Beau to all make a wisdom saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: My clay pot is glowing?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Nine.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Both of you succeed actually.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Tell me something cool!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The secrets begin to penetrate your ears. You close off your consciousness and put your hands up to close the space. They don't seem to penetrate your mind. Beau, however, these words start shooting into your brain. You feel for a moment your grasp on reality begin to slip. Suddenly, the world begins to spin. You feel yourself assaulted from all angles. You see flashes of ancient warfare, of giant columns of fire crashing from the cosmos. You spin your staff around retroactively. I need you to make an attack against Yasha, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, boo! It's not good, an 11.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: No sorry, ten.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: I'm pretty sure that doesn't hit you.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see Beau, suddenly her eyes go wide, swing the staff wide in your direction. You deflect it with your blade.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Fuck you, Genghis Khan!

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Oh, man, I forgot that. I need all of you to roll a wisdom saving throw, please.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. The little interior bit, what is it again?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You see this dull, blue glow that's now visible from where you struck through it. It looks like it's falling apart.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (shouting) Steal his heart! Take his heart!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Yasha, that ends your turn?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Can I punch it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Unfortunately, no. You've already used your action. That's what a monk does. Just a little flick--

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All done.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That ends Yasha's turn. Now the one wisp that's by you is going to shift through the wall onto this side and is going to make a strike at you, Fjord. That is a 16 to hit.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: That hits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: That is 12 points of lightning damage to you.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, that was a big one. Shit, okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As it shocks through you, and you fall to one knee for a moment. It's going to shift into that pillar and vanish. You do get an attack of opportunity on it as it leaves your range.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Disadvantage, or regular?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Regular.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 14 does not hit. You go to strike, and unfortunately it just makes it into the pillar and you hit stone and sparks off of it. It does take one point of force damage from spending its turn inside the wall. Now it is the entity's turn. It is going to attempt-- we'll see if its Howling Babble returns. It gets its Howling Babble back.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: We're all right here.
